customerprofiles.eventstream.CfnAbout: An Event Stream resource of Amazon Connect Customer Profiles.

customerprofiles.eventstream.DomainName.Description: The unique name of the domain.

customerprofiles.eventstream.EventStream.Description: The name of the event stream.

customerprofiles.eventstream.Tags.Description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for this resource.

customerprofiles.eventstream.Uri.Description: The StreamARN of the destination to deliver profile events to. For example, arn:aws:kinesis:region:account-id:stream/stream-name.
